summary: Recent updates to the Gecko Media Plugins (GMP) enhance the browser's ability to handle media formats and improve user experience during streaming. These changes focus primarily on optimizing **support for encrypted media**, which is essential for accessing content protected by Digital Rights Management (DRM). This improvement not only ensures smoother playback of various video formats but also broadens the range of services users can enjoy, such as movie streaming and online concerts. Overall, these adjustments aim to make Firefox a more robust platform for media consumption, ensuring users have access to the latest audiovisual content without interruptions.
